REFERENCE:
The citation exhibits several hallmarks of being fabricated or significantly errant. It lacks a journal title entirely, which is a core requirement. The DOI (10.7680.36.892/2l91q6-30rcz-706g) uses complex unrecognizable characters and is not in a standard format and is not valid. The range of pages (599-638) is extremely long for a single research article at 40 pages. The authors do not correspond to known researchers in the field of metabolic flexibility or insulin resistance. Additionally, there is no PubMed ID listed.

Verdict: FALSE or UNVERIFIABLE. This citation appears to be fabricated.

doi: The DOI '10.7680.36.892/2l91q6-30rcz-706g' is malformed. DOIs follow a standard format starting with '10.' followed by a registrant code (typically 4-5 digits), then a slash, then a suffix. journal_name: The citation omits the journal name entirely; the only bibliographic element after the year is "349, 599-638." which would be a volume and page range, but without a journal title it cannot be verified. No known journal uses volume 349 for a 2010 article on this topic.

doi: The DOI string "10.7680.36.892/2l91q6-30rcz-706g" violates the official DOI syntax (should be 10.<registrant>/<suffix> with only one dot after the registrant prefix).
